item.text:
The patch closes some first-pass cases, but the provider-event fallback is still permissive enough to synthesize false `REVIEW_RUN` results, and the stale-scope guard only catches net before/after differences. Those are correctness issues in the maintainer review gate, so the patch should not be considered correct yet.

Full review comments:

- [P1] Reject non-assistant `final_message`/`last_message` fallback — /Users/xiongjiangkai/xjk_papers/leanatlas/tools/loop/review_runner.py:246-251
  If the provider emits JSONL like `{"type":"tool.completed","final_message":"..."}` and never writes a canonical response file, `_terminal_message_from_event` returns that text before checking assistant role or terminal state. `run_review_closure` then materializes `response_ref` from a tool/system event and reports `REVIEW_RUN`, so the false-pass path this patch is trying to close is still present whenever a provider uses `last_message` or `final_message` outside an assistant terminal message.

- [P2] Match terminal event tokens exactly instead of by substring — /Users/xiongjiangkai/xjk_papers/leanatlas/tools/loop/review_runner.py:253-259
  `is_terminal` is computed with substring checks on the joined event tokens, so non-terminal values like `status: "incomplete"` satisfy `"complete" in event_tokens`. In that case an assistant progress event can still synthesize a canonical `response_ref` and become `REVIEW_RUN`, even though the provider never emitted a terminal assistant message.

- [P1] Detect scope mutations that are reverted before process exit — /Users/xiongjiangkai/xjk_papers/leanatlas/tools/loop/review_runner.py:462-471
  The stale-input safeguard only hashes `scope_paths` once before launch and once after the command exits. If the review command (or another concurrent task) rewrites a scoped file and restores the original bytes before termination, both fingerprints still match and this branch accepts the attempt as `REVIEW_RUN`, even though the reviewer may have read mutated source during execution. That leaves the stale-after-run acceptance bug only partially fixed.
